chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5871 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.22. 2. For orders on CMA No.26075/2024. 3. For orders on CMA No.26076/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2025 Mr. Irfan Aziz, advocate for the petitioner. Essentially relief sought in this petition is with respect to respondents No.4 to 7 demonstrably private persons. The said persons could not be fallen in the category of persons per Article 199 of the Constitution. In view hereof, petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
